targets.rawSql:
with consistent_get as (
    SELECT csg.time 
         , csg.avg_value avg_value, csg.max_value max_value
         , i.instance_name 
    --     , csg.partition_key
     FROM public.apm_db_info i 
        , lpsis1.ora_db_stat_minor csg
        , public.ora_stat_name csgn   
    WHERE 1=1
      AND i.db_id = csg.db_id
      AND i.db_id = csgn.db_id
      AND csg.db_id = csgn.db_id
      AND csg.stat_id = csgn.stat_id   
      AND csg.stat_version = csgn.stat_version
      AND i.instance_name in ($ServerName)
      AND csgn.stat_name = 'consistent gets'
      AND csg.partition_key between concat(to_char(to_timestamp($__timeFrom(),'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYMMDD'::text), LPAD(trim(to_char(i.db_id,'9')),3,'0'))::numeric 
                                and concat(to_char(to_timestamp($__timeTo(),'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYMMDD'::text), LPAD(trim(to_char(i.db_id,'9')),3,'0'))::numeric
      AND $__timeFilter(csg.time)
),
block_get as (
    SELECT dbg.time 
         , dbg.avg_value avg_value, dbg.max_value max_value
         , i.instance_name 
    --     , dbg.partition_key
     FROM public.apm_db_info i 
        , lpsis1.ora_db_stat_minor dbg
        , public.ora_stat_name dbgn
    WHERE 1=1
      AND i.db_id = dbg.db_id
      AND i.db_id = dbgn.db_id
      AND dbg.db_id = dbgn.db_id
      AND dbg.stat_id = dbgn.stat_id  
      AND dbg.stat_version = dbgn.stat_version
      AND i.instance_name in ($ServerName)
      AND dbgn.stat_name = 'db block gets'
      AND dbg.partition_key between concat(to_char(to_timestamp($__timeFrom(),'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYMMDD'::text), LPAD(trim(to_char(i.db_id,'9')),3,'0'))::numeric 
                                and concat(to_char(to_timestamp($__timeTo(),'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYMMDD'::text), LPAD(trim(to_char(i.db_id,'9')),3,'0'))::numeric
      AND $__timeFilter(dbg.time)
),
physical_read as (
    SELECT phr.time 
         , phr.avg_value avg_value, phr.max_value max_value
         , i.instance_name 
     FROM public.apm_db_info i 
        , lpsis1.ora_db_stat_major phr
        , public.ora_stat_name phrn
    WHERE 1=1
      AND i.db_id = phr.db_id
      AND i.db_id = phrn.db_id
      AND phr.db_id = phrn.db_id
      AND phr.stat_id = phrn.stat_id  
      AND phr.stat_version = phrn.stat_version
      AND i.instance_name in ($ServerName)
      AND phrn.stat_name = 'physical reads'
      AND phr.partition_key between concat(to_char(to_timestamp($__timeFrom(),'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYMMDD'::text), LPAD(trim(to_char(i.db_id,'9')),3,'0'))::numeric 
                                and concat(to_char(to_timestamp($__timeTo(),'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYMMDD'::text), LPAD(trim(to_char(i.db_id,'9')),3,'0'))::numeric
      AND $__timeFilter(phr.time)
)
SELECT c.time 
     , round((1-((p.avg_value)/(b.avg_value+c.avg_value)))*100,2) AS hit_ratio
    -- , round((1-((p.max_value)/(b.max_value+c.max_value)))*100,2) AS min_value
     , c.instance_name 
 FROM consistent_get c, block_get b, physical_read p
WHERE 1=1
  AND c.time = b.time
  AND c.time = p.time
ORDER BY time

      AND phrn.stat_name = 'physical reads'
      AND phr.partition_key between concat(to_char(to_timestamp($__timeFrom(),'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYMMDD'::text), LPAD(trim(to_char(i.db_id,'9')),3,'0'))::numeric
